oracle.title: [ THE ORACLE SPEAKS ]
oracle.quote: "I am the Oracle of the Machine Spirit. I know the secrets of pipelines, the fate of containers, and the karmic debts of technical debt."

truths.cards: Cards do not lie. Only pipelines do.
truths.deploy: Every deploy is a prayer into the void.
truths.fate: The fate of code is decided here.

empty.description: Configure your reading and draw the cards to see what fate awaits your deploy.
